hypothesis: On trending instruments (XAUUSD, GER40, US500) M15, a 20-bar Donchian channel breakout filtered by ADX>20 captures volatility-expansion moves with positive expectancy. Breakouts that occur during ADX-confirmed regimes outperform naive breakouts by avoiding chop whipsaws.

regime_filter.purpose: Require directional regime; skip ranging markets where breakouts fail.

exits.trailing: chandelier: 3.0 * atr(14) from highest-high-since-entry, activated after +1.5R

session_filter: 07:00-20:00 UTC (London + NY overlap, avoid Asia low-liquidity chop)
